files_changed.summary: Core types: ToolSource, TaskStatus, TaskPriority, ToolResult, AuthConfig with SecretStr
MCP server core with tool registration, async handler support, task tool endpoints
Fernet-encrypted token storage with auto-generated key file
OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with local callback server
Environment-variable-based auth config loader for Gmail and GitHub
Pydantic Task/TaskStore models with immutable upsert
File-based JSON task persistence per source
Task CRUD operations with sequential ID generation
Gmail API client with message listing, reading, and search
MCP tool registration for Gmail (3 tools, stub handlers)
GitHub API client with issues, PRs, CI status, run detail, job logs
MCP tool registration for GitHub (5 monitoring + 2 action tools, stub handlers)
Issue-to-task sync with priority label mapping
PR-to-task sync, skips draft PRs
CI failure-to-task sync with failed job names
Safe git subprocess execution (no shell, no token in URL)
PR review environment: clone, checkout, return changed files
CI debug environment: clone at failed SHA, fetch per-job logs
Template for new tool module registration
Template for new API client

decisions.rationale: Python API client ecosystem more mature, Pydantic provides runtime validation + JSON Schema generation
alternatives_rejected: TypeScript: less mature API clients for Google/GitHub

decisions.rationale: Simpler management, tools share task store and auth infrastructure
alternatives_rejected: Separate servers per service: management complexity

decisions.rationale: Standard symmetric encryption, key from env var or auto-generated file
model_copy(update={}) prevents mutation bugs, returns new objects
Avoids setuptools flat-layout discovery errors with multiple packages

lessons: Tool handlers registered as stubs — actual client injection was deferred and never completed (C1)
Token sanitization patterns were duplicated across 4 files with inconsistent coverage
expires_in vs expires_at confusion caused token always-expired bug — unit tests would have caught this
TDD was applied for M2-M5 but without the Phase 1 QR gate, design issues accumulated
unresolved: C1: Gmail/GitHub handlers are stubs — always raise NotImplementedError
C2: Token patterns miss github_pat_, ghs_, ghr_, gha_ prefixes
M1: No httpx connection pooling — new client per request
M2+M3: OAuth callback has no timeout and ignores error parameter
m9: Token sanitization patterns duplicated across 4 files
m10: No direct unit tests for TokenStore, OAuthFlow, FileTaskStore
next_steps: M6: Wire handlers to actual clients, consolidate sanitization, add connection pooling
Apply QR gate after M6 completion
